posts.text: BREAKING: The US has issued Iran a general oil-related license allowing the production, delivery, and sale of Iranian-origin oil, petrochemical, and petroleum products through August 21st. Iranian oil is officially returning to global markets for the first time since 2018.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
